description: A connector is pure data: it lines the columns of a common POS/back-office store export up with the retail-store-network pack's fields. Rename the left side to match your export's headers.

value_hints.monthly_sales: strip $ and commas — Aris reads money either way
value_hints.margin_pct: a number like 31.5, not the string '31.5%'
value_hints.Banner: your 'banner'/'brand'/'chain' column all map to chain

note: No code here — a connector is a column-to-field map. Your POS export never leaves your control except as the records you choose to load.
